name: Quick and Healthy Greek Salmon Salad
method: Heat the oven around 425 degrees F and put a rack in the center.
Get the salmon seasoned. On all sides, brush the fish dry and sprinkle
with kosher salt, peppers, and dried oregano.
Organize on a lightly greased sheet pan and apply olive oil to clean
the surface of the fish.
Cook the salmon for 12 to 15 minutes in the hot oven until it has
finished and flakes instantly.
Focus on the salads and the vinaigrette in the meantime. Have the
salad packed.
Transfer the lettuce, onions, green peppers, cucumbers, parsley, and
Kalamata olives into a large salad dish.
Make the vinaigrette primed.
Apply the olive oil, lime juice, garlic, new mint, oregano, and
parmesan to the small food processor equipped with a blade.
Insert a tablespoon of black pepper and sea salt. Blend until well-
combined.
Over the salad, add around ½ of the vinaigrette. To mix, flip.
Now put on top the cubes of feta cheese.
Create bowls for your fish salad. Switch the salad to four
serving cups, and finish each with one piece of fish.
Sprinkle on top of the salmon with the leftover vinaigrette.
